nodes.label: CI workflow: migrate deploy + drift check
Rollback plan (manual SQL down + dump restore)
Switch from db push to migrate (resolve --applied)
Drift check workarounds (Option A disable, Option B composite PK)
Step-up rationale (re-prove MFA for sensitive admin actions)
Client contract (401 + retry with same Idempotency-Key)
Security controls (anti-replay TOTP, mfaEnabled defense-in-depth, rate-limit, burst, CRLF)
DPIA — risques résiduels A2 round 2 (M-5, M-6, H-3)
Break-glass procedures (rate-limit unlock, MFA opt-out by Direction Médicale)
Production rollout procedure (J-48h email, J0 deploy, J0+1h monitoring)
US-SEC-001 — Enforce DOCTOR/NURSE role on insulin-therapy mutations (HIGH)
US-SEC-002 — Enforce soft-delete filter at service layer (MEDIUM)
13 categories verified clean (crypto, JWT, MFA replay, RBAC, CSRF, etc.)
Encrypted fields inventory (User, MedicalData, Events, Appointment, Pregnancy)
OVH S3 protection (SSE-S3 AES256, TLS 1.3, no presigned URL, ClamAV)
Env vars table (HEALTH_DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY, HMAC_SECRET, JWT keys, OVH S3, Firebase)
FCM push notification protections (no PHI in payload, sanitized templates, rate limit fail-closed)
RBAC hierarchy (ADMIN > DOCTOR > NURSE > VIEWER) + canAccessPatient
Principles (no stack traces, no PHI in logs, camelCase codes)
Error codes catalog (auth, RGPD, data, limits, system)
Patient-safety error scenarios (ISF=0, hypo, dose>25U, soft-delete, GDPR retiré)
MFA enrollment flow (setup → QR → verify, two-step)
MFA rate limiting buckets (verify, challenge, disable)
MFA audit events HDS §IV.3 (MFA_ENABLED, MFA_DISABLED, MFA_CHALLENGE_FAILED, LOGIN)
Compliance context (HDS ISO 27001 A.9.4.2, ANSSI RGS v2.0, RGPD Art. 17)
Logout flow (verifyJwt, invalidateSession, revokeSession Redis, audit)
invalidateAllUserSessions bulk revocation (admin disable, RGPD Art. 17, role change)
Vitest over Jest rationale (ESM, speed, TS, alias)
Unit tests inventory (insulin, crypto, audit, patient, validation)
CI guards (playwright testDir, vitest include patterns)
BDD run commands (pnpm bdd:gen, pnpm bdd:test)
BDD next steps (DB effect steps, reset, data-testid)

hyperedges.label: Diabeo security stack (encryption + MFA + session revocation)
Migrations Prisma lifecycle (dev, CI, prod, rollback)
Test strategy layers (Vitest unit, manual exploratory, Gherkin BDD POC)
Step-up MFA implementation (helper, error response, audit, client contract)
